top_signals.title: US Nuclear Pilot Program Notches Second Reactor Breakthrough
top_signals.summary: Valar Atomics Inc., a Southern California-based startup, has reached a key milestone in its effort to develop small reactors under a US program aimed at accelerating the deployment of nuclear power.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MSCI Flags Indonesia Information Flow Worries in Annual Report
top_signals.summary: MSCI Inc. highlighted concerns over investors’ ability to access information in Indonesia’s stock market ahead of a potential downgrade that could further weigh on the world’s worst-performing equities.

top_signals.title: BHP Shares Fall After $2.3 Billion Writedown on Potash Mine
top_signals.summary: BHP Group shares fell after the company flagged a $2.3 billion writedown on its giant potash mine in Canada due to cost and time overruns for an expansion of the project.

top_signals.title: Tunisia coach Herve ⁠Renard braces for trial by fire against Japan
top_signals.summary: "I know very well the quality of this team," Renard said. "Japan are the best team in ​Asia."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
